description_long: This is a round, squat pumpkin with a deep green, mottled rind and a short, thick, woody stem at the top. The surface is textured with subtle ridges and scattered pale speckles, giving it a natural, rustic appearance. One side of the pumpkin displays a patch of yellow-orange coloration, suggesting ripeness or sun exposure. The stem is rough and slightly curved, with a dry, fibrous look. The pumpkin's overall shape is slightly flattened, and its skin appears hard and matte. There are no visible carvings, decorations, or facial features on its surface.
description: A round, deep green pumpkin with a mottled, textured surface and a short, woody stem. One side shows a yellow-orange patch, adding visual interest.
description_view_0: This view shows the pumpkin's dark green, mottled surface and the short, central stem, with minimal yellowing visible.
description_view_1: The pumpkin appears uniformly green and round from this angle, with the stem clearly visible and no significant discoloration.
description_view_2: This side reveals a prominent yellow-orange patch on the pumpkin's surface, contrasting with the green rind and highlighting natural color variation.
description_view_3: The yellow-orange area is more visible here, along with the textured green skin and the stem positioned at the top center.
